title: Add embeddable iframe to the site

requirements.summary: Add Iframe URL field to Admin Dashboard CMS panel with mutation hook
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard has a clearly labeled 'Iframe URL' text input field
The input is pre-populated with the current `iframeSrc` from `getContent()`
A Save button triggers `updateIframeSrc()` with the input value
After a successful save, the content query is invalidated and refetched

file_operations.description: Add useUpdateIframeSrc mutation hook that calls actor.updateIframeSrc(src) and invalidates the 'content' query key on success, following the same pattern as existing mutations like useUpdateAboutText

Add an 'Iframe URL' section to the admin CMS panel with a text input pre-populated from content.iframeSrc, a Save button that triggers the useUpdateIframeSrc mutation, and error/success feedback following the same UI pattern as existing CMS fields

requirements.summary: Render responsive iframe on Press Kit page between Video and About sections
acceptanceCriteria: The iframe section is not rendered when `iframeSrc` is empty
The iframe is rendered between the Video Section and the About the Game section when `iframeSrc` is non-empty
The iframe is 100% width and maintains a 16:9 aspect ratio on all screen sizes
The iframe has no visible border
The iframe src is driven by the `iframeSrc` value from the content query

file_operations.description: Add a conditional iframe section between VideoSection and the About section that renders only when content.iframeSrc is non-empty. The iframe must be wrapped in a responsive container with 100% width and 16:9 aspect ratio (using padding-bottom: 56.25% technique), have no border, and respect light/dark theme styling with appropriate wrapper classes
